{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35213", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1333", "name": "Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity"}], "description": "All versions of `@hapi/content` through 6.0.0 are vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via crafted HTTP header values. Three regular expressions used to parse `Content-Type` and `Content-Disposition` headers contain patterns susceptible to catastrophic backtracking. This has been fixed in v6.0.1.

### Impact

Denial of Service. An unauthenticated remote attacker can cause a Node.js process to become unresponsive by sending a single HTTP request with a maliciously crafted header value.

### Patches

Fixed by tightening all three regular expressions to eliminate backtracking.

### Workarounds

There are no known workarounds. Upgrade to the patched version.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00413, "percentile": 0.33504}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-04T04:23:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35213"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-06T21:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-04-04T04:23:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/hapijs/content/security/advisories/GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p", "https://github.com/hapijs/content/pull/38", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35213", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/hapijs/content/security-advisories/GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/hapijs/content", "summary": "@hapi/content: Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in HTTP header parsing", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T13:43:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jg4p-7fhp-p32p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@hapi/content"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @hapi/content: Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in HTTP header parsing
